summary: Invisible Text in Inventory Modal (Light Mode) Bug Fix - ALL TESTS PASSED. The fix adds explicit color styles for light mode to select dropdowns and labels in the 'Nuevo Insumo' modal. Tested across Desktop 1280px, Safari iOS 390px, and Android Chrome 412px viewports. All text elements (Unidad de Despacho, Categoría, Conversión de Unidades label, Yo compro por) display dark text (#1E293B) on light background correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility issue but not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Line 34: isLightMode = isMinimalist && !isNeoDark - correctly determines light mode
Line 547: Unidad de Despacho select has style={isLightMode ? { color: '#1E293B', WebkitTextFillColor: '#1E293B' } : {}}
Line 549-550: Options have style={{ color: '#1E293B', backgroundColor: '#FFFFFF' }}
Line 568: Categoría select has same light mode styling
Line 570: Categoría options have same styling
Line 587-590: 'Conversión de Unidades *' label has light mode styling
Line 618-621: 'Yo compro por' select has light mode styling with explicit colors
Line 624-625: Options have same styling for visibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: Invisible text bug in Inventory modal (Light Mode) has been fixed. The fix applies explicit color styles (color: #1E293B, WebkitTextFillColor: #1E293B) to select dropdowns and labels when isLightMode is true. Options have style={{ color: '#1E293B', backgroundColor: '#FFFFFF' }} for visibility. All viewports tested successfully.

unidad_despacho_dropdown_light_mode.description: Dropdown text visible with color rgb(29, 40, 58) ≈ #1E293B

dropdown_options_visibility.description: All dropdown options show dark text (#1E293B) on white background (#FFFFFF)
